headline.title: 标普500创历史周涨势，受美伊停火预期推动
headline.summary: 受美伊停火协议有望结束冲突的预期推动，美国股市连续多周上涨，标普500指数创下历史性周涨势。人工智能交易风潮也提供了支撑，市场情绪乐观。本周上涨延续近期强势，反映投资者对地缘风险缓解和科技增长的信心。
headline.title_en: S&P 500 Powers Historic Weekly Run on US-Iran Bets: Markets Wrap
headline.summary_en: Hopes that a ceasefire deal could pave the way for an end to the Iran conflict drove U.S. stocks to a historic streak of weekly gains, with the S&P 500 leading the rally. The market was also buoyed by the artificial-intelligence trade, reflecting optimism about de-escalation and tech growth. This extension of the winning streak highlights risk-on sentiment amid geopolitical easing.
headline.reason: 标普500创历史周涨势，连接美伊停火预期与AI交易热潮，是今日全球市场最具冲击力的信号，同时覆盖财经理财和AI科技两大板块。
headline.reason_en: The S&P 500's historic weekly run, tying Iran ceasefire hopes with AI trade momentum, serves as the most impactful signal across global markets, bridging finance and AI technology sectors.
